working_on: Pairing A (#66 gitleaks + #70 bandit) pre-commit security scanners + MemPalace rogue-wing cleanup
outcome_summary: Pairing A closed at S-0132 — six deliverables landed: engine/adr/0067-gitleaks-pre-commit-secret-scanning.md (Accepted) + engine/adr/0068-bandit-sast-pre-commit-and-ci.md (Accepted); engine/tools/gitleaks.toml + engine/tools/bandit.yaml; engine/build_readiness/gitleaks_first_exercise.md (T1-A/B/C all closed empirically) + engine/build_readiness/bandit_first_exercise.md (T1-A closed via direct gate invocation against synthetic eval scratch returning B307 HIGH/HIGH exit 1; T1-B closed via CI run 25741717146 success on push d7b85ff). GitHub repo security_and_analysis flipped: secret_scanning + secret_scanning_push_protection disabled→enabled via gh api -X PATCH (round-trip verified). Issue #2 commented with recurrence forensics — S-0043 upstream fix is incomplete for .claude/worktrees/<name> path shape (.claude dotfile + worktrees segment trips the encoded.rsplit('-', 1)[-1] logic); Issue stays OPEN. Eight commits this session: eager-claim + gitleaks deliverables + gitleaks readiness closure + bandit deliverables + ruff-format-induced test-fixture nosec relocation fix + bandit readiness closure + STATE/ENGINE_LOG/ADR-index updates + closeout.
